description: Source-of-truth list of JS files vendored from Hevolve_React_Native into Nunba-Companion-iOS. Read by scripts/sync-from-android.sh. Each entry maps a source path (relative to the Android repo root) to a destination path (relative to js/shared/). Files are copied verbatim — destinations should NEVER be hand-edited.

groups.name: stores
groups.rationale: Zustand stores. All verified pure-JS (no NativeModules imports). Drives shared state on both platforms.

groups.name: theme
groups.rationale: Color tokens + design system. Pure JS objects.

groups.name: utils
groups.rationale: Pure-JS helpers. No native imports verified by grep.

groups.name: hooks
groups.rationale: React hooks with no NativeModules / DeviceEventEmitter imports. Mic-amplitude, multiplayer-sync, and speech-recognition hooks are deliberately EXCLUDED — they require iOS-native rewrites and live in js/ios/hooks/ instead.

groups.name: services
groups.rationale: API client + business-logic layer. Some files import NativeModules (OnboardingModule, PeerLinkModule, WearDataSyncModule, etc.) — those NativeModule names form the contract iOS-side Swift modules must implement. JS itself stays platform-agnostic.

deliberately_excluded.reason: Imports NativeModules. The store itself is small and iOS-specific UUID persistence (Keychain) differs from Android's SharedPreferences — reimplement in js/ios/.
Imports NativeModules and calls FCM-specific paths. iOS uses APNs; rewrite in js/ios/.
Reads from native AudioRecorder. iOS uses AVAudioEngine — different bindings.
Wired to Android-specific WAMP bridge events. iOS port uses URLSessionWebSocket-based WAMP and emits the same event names — hook will be reimplemented in js/ios/hooks/.
Android SpeechRecognizer. iOS uses SFSpeechRecognizer (Speech framework) — different permission model + result shape.
Sync deferred. Many components are cross-platform but the kids-learning + agentic-overlay + signup screens have native imports. Per-component classification + copy is a follow-up sync pass.
All Java/Kotlin. iOS native modules live in ios/NunbaCompanion/Modules/.
Apple Watch is a separate WatchOS project. Different SDK, different paradigm. Out of scope for this port.
tvOS is a separate target. Out of scope for this port.
Will need a Metal port. Future phase.

policy.edits_to_synced_files: FORBIDDEN. js/shared/ is vendored — any edit gets clobbered on the next sync. If iOS needs to diverge, copy the file out of shared/ into js/ios/ first.
policy.adding_new_synced_files: 1) Add the path to this manifest. 2) Run scripts/sync-from-android.sh. 3) Commit both the manifest update and the new file in one commit.
policy.removing_synced_files: Remove from manifest, delete from js/shared/, commit both. Don't leave orphans.
